def negative_public_package_missing_all_list():
    rule_id = "public_package_missing_all_list"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Non-trivial package __init__.py defines public symbols without an __all__ list."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
